title: Update skill-creator from upstream anthropics/skills
body:
Syncs the skill-creator skill with upstream [anthropics/skills](https://github.com/anthropics/skills/tree/main/skills/skill-creator) commit `7029232b`.

## Changes

**New eval framework:**
- `agents/` — grader, comparator, analyzer subagent instructions
- `eval-viewer/` — generate_review.py + viewer.html for interactive output review
- `assets/` — eval_review.html template for description optimization

**New scripts:**
- `run_eval.py` / `run_loop.py` — description triggering optimization loop
- `aggregate_benchmark.py` — benchmark aggregation with mean ± stddev
- `improve_description.py` / `generate_report.py` — description improvement helpers
- `utils.py` — shared utilities

**Updated:**
- `SKILL.md` — full eval/iterate workflow with viewer integration
- `package_skill.py` / `quick_validate.py` — minor updates
- `references/schemas.md` — replaces output-patterns.md + workflows.md

**Removed:**
- `references/output-patterns.md`, `references/workflows.md`, `scripts/init_skill.py`
